news.t: Dimensional Adds Three New US Equity ETFs to Growing Offering

holdings.infoBox: DFAR is an equity ETF with a total of 129 individual holdings. The top holdings are Welltower stock at 7.42%, Prologis at 6.76%, Equinix at 5.37%, Simon Property Group at 4.50%, and Realty Income at 4.40%.

overview.description: The Dimensional US Real Estate ETF (DFAR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund is actively managed to invest in US companies whose principal activities are engaged in the broad real estate sector, including REITs. Portfolio holdings are weighted by market capitalization. DFAR was launched on Feb 23, 2022 and is issued by Dimensional.

data.title: Dimensional Adds Three New US Equity ETFs to Growing Offering
data.text: AUSTIN, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Dimensional Fund Advisors, a global leader in systematic multifactor investing, expanded its exchange-traded funds (ETFs) offering with today's listing of three new US ...
